Part.Source: Event Start loadWWPContext.Call(&wwpContext) &FilCod = &wwpContext.FilCod do 'getCotacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid1.Rows = Page.Rows &Grid1CurrentPage = 1 &Grid1CurrentPage.Visible = False &Grid1PageCount = -1 Grid2.Rows = 0 &ActionGroup2Data = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Produtos da Cotação' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'VisualizarProdutosCotacao' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Menor preço dos fornecedores' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Observações dos fornecedores' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'USerObservacoes' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Produtos Empatados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'VisualizarEmpatados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = '----------------------------------------' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'UserAction3es' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Produtos confirmados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'VisualizarConfirmados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup2DataItem = new() &ActionGroup2DataItem.Title = 'Produtos NÃO confirmados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.EventKey = !'VisualizarNaoConfirmados' &ActionGroup2DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup2Data.Add(&ActionGroup2DataItem) &ActionGroup1Data = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Confirmar compra dos fornecedores com menor preço' &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'UserAction1' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Confirmar produtos empatados' &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'ConfirmarEmpatados' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) Grid1PaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid1.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&Grid1PageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. &Quantidade.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' CotComForSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &CountForn = 1 &Grid1PageCount = grid1.PageCount &Grid1CurrentPage = grid1.currentPage EndEvent Event Grid1.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &UserUpdate = !'' If (CotComSts = StatusCotacao.Finalizada) &UserUpdate.Class = !'Attribute' Else &UserUpdate.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &UserUpdateItem = !'' If (CotComSts = StatusCotacao.Finalizada) &UserUpdateItem.Class = !'Attribute' Else &UserUpdateItem.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &ProUserObs = !'' &Quantidade.ColumnClass = iif(CotComProDtaHorLct > CotComDtaHorLib, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &EmbCod <> CotComProEmbCod &EmbCod = CotComProEmbCod do 'getEmbalagem' Endif &Embalagem = &auxEmbalagem &FornSel = CotComProSelForCod &FornMenor = CotComProMenForCod &CotComItmCod = CotComItmCod do 'getValoresFornecedor' If (&IsTemObs = true) &ProUserObs.Class = !'Attribute' Else &ProUserObs.Class = !'Invisible' Endif if CotComProQtd > 0 &Quantidade = RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0, trim(toformattedString(CotComProQtd))) Else &Quantidade = '---' Endif EndEvent Event Grid2.Load &Ident = 'Forn'+trim(str(&CountForn)) &CountForn += 1 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &UserEditForn = !'' If (CotComSts = StatusCotacao.Finalizada) &UserEditForn.Class = !'Attribute' Else &UserEditForn.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &UserObs = !'' If (not CotComForObs.IsEmpty() and not CotComForObs.IsNull()) &UserObs.Class = !'Attribute' Else &UserObs.Class = !'Invisible' Endif Do Case Case CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.BLOQUEADO CotComForSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.FINALIZADA CotComForSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.LIBERADO CotComForSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise CotComForSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &UserObs.TooltipText = CotComForObs.Trim() EndEvent Event Grid1PaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case Grid1PaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &Grid1CurrentPage -= 1 Grid1.PreviousPage() Case Grid1PaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &Grid1CurrentPage += 1 Grid1.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(Grid1PaginationBar.SelectedPage) &Grid1CurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid1.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid1PaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid1.Rows = Grid1PaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &Grid1CurrentPage = 1 Grid1.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &UserUpdate.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserUpdate_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserUpdate_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcSelecionarFornecedorPadrao.Create(EmpCod, CotComCod, CotComItmCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserUpdate_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &UserUpdateItem.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserUpdateItem_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserUpdateItem_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcUpdateItemCotacao.Create(EmpCod, CotComCod, CotComItmCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserUpdateItem_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_ActionGroup2.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'VisualizarProdutosCotacao' Do 'Do VisualizarProdutosCotacao' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores' Do 'Do Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'USerObservacoes' Do 'Do USerObservacoes' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'VisualizarEmpatados' Do 'Do VisualizarEmpatados' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'UserAction3es' Do 'Do UserAction3es' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'VisualizarConfirmados' Do 'Do VisualizarConfirmados' Case ddo_ActionGroup2.ActiveEventKey = !'VisualizarNaoConfirmados' Do 'Do VisualizarNaoConfirmados' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event VisualizarProdutosCotacao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcProdutosEmpatadosNaoConfirmados.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, 'L') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcMenorPrecofornecedor.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event USerObservacoes_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcObservacoesFornecedores.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event VisualizarEmpatados_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcProdutosEmpatadosNaoConfirmados.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, 'E') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event VisualizarConfirmados_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcProdutosConfirmados.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event VisualizarNaoConfirmados_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcProdutosEmpatadosNaoConfirmados.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, 'N') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_ActionGroup1.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'UserAction1' Do 'Do UserAction1' Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'ConfirmarEmpatados' Do 'Do ConfirmarEmpatados' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction1_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcConfirmarCompraMenorPreco.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserAction1_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ConfirmarEmpatados_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcConfirmarEmpatados.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ConfirmarEmpatados_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &UserEditForn.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserEditForn_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserEditForn_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcEditarInformacaoFornCotacao.Create(&EmpCod, &CotComCod, CotComForCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserEditForn_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserSair' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpDadosCotacao.Call(&EmpCod, &CotComCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'Do VisualizarProdutosCotacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ VisualizarProdutosCotacao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Impr1MenorPrecoFornecedores_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do USerObservacoes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ USerObservacoes_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do VisualizarEmpatados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ VisualizarEmpatados_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserAction3es' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do VisualizarConfirmados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ VisualizarConfirmados_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do VisualizarNaoConfirmados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ VisualizarNaoConfirmados_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserAction1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserAction1_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConfirmarEmpatados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ConfirmarEmpatados_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event Enter do 'loadProdutos' EndEvent Sub 'getEmbalagem' &auxEmbalagem = '' For Each Order EmpCod, EmbCod Where EmpCod = &EmPCod Where EmbCod = &EmbCod &auxEmbalagem = EmbUnd.Trim() + ' - ' + EmbNom.Trim() Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'getValoresFornecedor' &Forn1.SetEmpty() &Forn2.SetEmpty() &Forn3.SetEmpty() &Forn4.SetEmpty() &Forn5.SetEmpty() &Forn6.SetEmpty() &Forn7.SetEmpty() &Forn8.SetEmpty() &Forn9.SetEmpty() &Forn10.SetEmpty() &Forn1.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &Forn2.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &Forn3.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &Forn4.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &Forn5.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &Forn6.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &Forn7.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &Forn8.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &Forn9.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &Forn10.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) For Each Order EmpCod, CotComCod, CotComItmCod, CotComProForCod Where EmpCod = &EmPCod Where CotComCod = &CotComCod Where CotComItmCod = &CotComItmCod Do CAse CAse CotComProForCod = &CotComForCod1 and CotComProForVlrFin > 0 &Forn1 = CotComProForVlrFin.ToFormattedString() Do Case CAse CotComProForCod = &FornSel &Forn1.ForeColor = RGB(180,0,0) CAse CotComProForCod = &FornMenor &Forn1.ForeColor = rgb(2, 115, 253) EndCAse CAse CotComProForCod = &CotComForCod2 and CotComProForVlrFin > 0 &Forn2 = CotComProForVlrFin.ToFormattedString() Do Case CAse CotComProForCod = &FornSel &Forn2.ForeColor = RGB(180,0,0) CAse CotComProForCod = &FornMenor &Forn2.ForeColor = rgb(2, 115, 253) EndCAse CAse CotComProForCod = &CotComForCod3 and CotComProForVlrFin > 0 &Forn3 = CotComProForVlrFin.ToFormattedString() Do Case CAse CotComProForCod = &FornSel &Forn3.ForeColor = RGB(180,0,0) CAse CotComProForCod = &FornMenor &Forn3.ForeColor = rgb(2, 115, 253) EndCAse CAse CotComProForCod = &CotComForCod4 and CotComProForVlrFin > 0 &Forn4 = CotComProForVlrFin.ToFormattedString() Do Case CAse CotComProForCod = &FornSel &Forn4.ForeColor = RGB(180,0,0) CAse CotComProForCod = &FornMenor &Forn4.ForeColor = rgb(2, 115, 253) EndCAse CAse CotComProForCod = &CotComForCod5 and CotComProForVlrFin > 0 &Forn5 = CotComProForVlrFin.ToFormattedString() Do Case CAse CotComProForCod = &FornSel &Forn5.ForeColor = RGB(180,0,0) CAse CotComProForCod = &FornMenor &Forn5.ForeColor = rgb(2, 115, 253) EndCAse CAse CotComProForCod = &CotComForCod6 and CotComProForVlrFin > 0 &Forn6 = CotComProForVlrFin.ToFormattedString() Do Case CAse CotComProForCod = &FornSel &Forn6.ForeColor = RGB(180,0,0) CAse CotComProForCod = &FornMenor &Forn6.ForeColor = rgb(2, 115, 253) EndCAse CAse CotComProForCod = &CotComForCod7 and CotComProForVlrFin > 0 &Forn7 = CotComProForVlrFin.ToFormattedString() Do Case CAse CotComProForCod = &FornSel &Forn7.ForeColor = RGB(180,0,0) CAse CotComProForCod = &FornMenor &Forn7.ForeColor = rgb(2, 115, 253) EndCAse CAse CotComProForCod = &CotComForCod8 and CotComProForVlrFin > 0 &Forn8 = CotComProForVlrFin.ToFormattedString() Do Case CAse CotComProForCod = &FornSel &Forn8.ForeColor = RGB(180,0,0) CAse CotComProForCod = &FornMenor &Forn8.ForeColor = rgb(2, 115, 253) EndCAse CAse CotComProForCod = &CotComForCod9 and CotComProForVlrFin > 0 &Forn9 = CotComProForVlrFin.ToFormattedString() Do Case CAse CotComProForCod = &FornSel &Forn9.ForeColor = RGB(180,0,0) CAse CotComProForCod = &FornMenor &Forn9.ForeColor = rgb(2, 115, 253) EndCAse CAse CotComProForCod = &CotComForCod10 and CotComProForVlrFin > 0 &Forn10 = CotComProForVlrFin.ToFormattedString() Do Case CAse CotComProForCod = &FornSel &Forn10.ForeColor = RGB(180,0,0) CAse CotComProForCod = &FornMenor &Forn10.ForeColor = rgb(2, 115, 253) EndCAse EndCAse if not CotComProForObs.IsEmpty() and not CotComProForObs.IsNull() &IsTemObs = true Endif EndFor EndSub Sub 'loadProdutos' prcLoadProdutosMultiplosCotacaoCompra.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &CotComCod, &CotComFilCod, &filtroProGraRef,&filtroProNom,&filtroProSts,&filtroMarCod,&filtroMarNom,&filtroPesCod,&filtroPesRaz, &opcaoDesconsiderarAdicionados, &sdtProdutosCotacao) EndSub Sub 'getCotacao' &Forn1.Visible = false &Forn2.Visible = false &Forn3.Visible = false &Forn4.Visible = false &Forn5.Visible = false &Forn6.Visible = false &Forn7.Visible = false &Forn8.Visible = false &Forn9.Visible = false &Forn10.Visible = false For Each Order EmpCod, CotComCod Where EmpCod = &EmPCod Where CotComCod = &CotComCod &CotComFilCod = CotComFilCod For Each Order EmpCod, CotComCod, CotComForCod Where CotComForSts = StatusCotacaoFornecedor.FINALIZADA Do CAse CAse &CotComForCod1.IsEmpty() &CotComForCod1 = CotComForCod &Forn1.Visible = true CAse &CotComForCod2.IsEmpty() &CotComForCod2 = CotComForCod &Forn2.Visible = true CAse &CotComForCod3.IsEmpty() &CotComForCod3 = CotComForCod &Forn3.Visible = true CAse &CotComForCod4.IsEmpty() &CotComForCod4 = CotComForCod &Forn4.Visible = true CAse &CotComForCod5.IsEmpty() &CotComForCod5 = CotComForCod &Forn5.Visible = true CAse &CotComForCod6.IsEmpty() &CotComForCod6 = CotComForCod &Forn6.Visible = true CAse &CotComForCod7.IsEmpty() &CotComForCod7 = CotComForCod &Forn7.Visible = true CAse &CotComForCod8.IsEmpty() &CotComForCod8 = CotComForCod &Forn8.Visible = true CAse &CotComForCod9.IsEmpty() &CotComForCod9 = CotComForCod &Forn9.Visible = true CAse &CotComForCod10.IsEmpty() &CotComForCod10 = CotComForCod &Forn10.Visible = true EndCASe EndFor Exit EndFor EndSub
